i{int} {i}  := 0
while(i{int} {i}  <= 511) 
	if((subarticulations_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids}  > 0) or (i{int} {i}  = 0))
		subarticulations_group_idx[i{int} {i} ]{int} {subarticulations_group_idx}  := get_group_idx(subarticulations_title_group[i{int} {i} ]{string} {subarticulations_title_group} ){Builtin, None, get_group_idx}
		subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulations_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions}  := i{int} {i} 
		if((nki_type{int} {nki_type}  # 0) and (subarticulations_group_idx[i{int} {i} ]{int} {subarticulations_group_idx}  # NI_NOT_FOUND{int} {NI_NOT_FOUND} ))
			loaded_instrument_types[0]{int} {loaded_instrument_types}  := subarticulations_instrument[i{int} {i} ]{int} {subarticulations_instrument} 
			message("set nki to inst: " & loaded_instrument_types[0]{int} {loaded_instrument_types} ){Builtin, None, message}
		end if
	else

		else

				_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min}  := 5
				_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max}  := 127

function update_all_ranges
	lowest1{int} {lowest1}  := 128
	highest1{int} {highest1}  := 0
	i6{int} {i6}  := 0
	while(i6{int} {i6}  <= 0) 
		iii2{int} {iii2}  := i6{int} {i6} 
		ii8{int} {ii8}  := 128
		i42{int} {i42}  := 0
		i331{int} {i331}  := 0
		group_count000{int} {group_count000}  := 0
		while(group_count000{int} {group_count000}  <= 7) 
			if(_keyswitch_states[(iii2{int} {iii2}  * 8) + group_count000{int} {group_count000} ]{int} {_keyswitch_states}  = 1)
				i331{int} {i331}  := 0
				while(i331{int} {i331}  <= 3) 
					if(_loaded_subarticulations[(iii2{int} {iii2}  * 32) + ((group_count000{int} {group_count000}  * 4) + i331{int} {i331} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations}  >= 0)
						if((subarticulations_range_lower[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(iii2{int} {iii2}  * 32) + ((group_count000{int} {group_count000}  * 4) + i331{int} {i331} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_range_lower}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(iii2{int} {iii2}  * 32) + ((group_count000{int} {group_count000}  * 4) + i331{int} {i331} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_octave_offset}  * 12)) < ii8{int} {ii8} )

function main_page_open
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_main_page{int} {pnl_main_page} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}

end function

function select_instrument_slot
	selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  := subarticulation0{int} {subarticulation0} 
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_instrument_name_ensemble{int} {lbl_instrument_name_ensemble} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "(" & instrument_name[loaded_instrument_types[subarticulation0{int} {subarticulation0} ]{int} {loaded_instrument_types} ]{string} {instrument_name}  & ")"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	mnu_instrument_selector{int} {mnu_instrument_selector}  := subarticulation0{int} {subarticulation0} 
	call update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, Call, update_keyswitch_selection}
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_editor_page{int} {pnl_editor_page} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} )
		call editor_page_open{UserDefined, Call, editor_page_open}
	else
		if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_main_page{int} {pnl_main_page} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} )
			call main_page_open{UserDefined, Call, main_page_open}
		end if
	end if
end function

function wait_or_zero{thread-unsafe}
	if(set_id1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {set_id1}  > 0)
		wait(set_id1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {set_id1} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
end function

function keyswitches_on_note_base{thread-unsafe}
	set_id1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {set_id1}  := lookahead{int} {lookahead}  * use_constant_delay{int} {use_constant_delay} 
	call wait_or_zero{UserDefined, Call, wait_or_zero}
	check_before0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {check_before0}  := 0
	changed0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {changed0}  := 0
	if(in_range(uiid2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {uiid2} , keyswitch_octave{int} {keyswitch_octave}  * 12, ((keyswitch_octave{int} {keyswitch_octave}  * 12) + 8) - 1){Builtin, None, in_range})
		inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  := 0
		ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1}  := 0
		inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  := 0
		while(inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  <= 0) 
			ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1}  := 0
			while(ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1}  <= 7) 
				check_before0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {check_before0}  := _keyswitch_states[(inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  * 8) + ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1} ]{int} {_keyswitch_states} 
				_keyswitch_states[(inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  * 8) + ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1} ]{int} {_keyswitch_states}  := KEY_DOWN[(keyswitch_octave{int} {keyswitch_octave}  * 12) + ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1} ]{int} {KEY_DOWN} 
				if(check_before0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {check_before0}  # _keyswitch_states[(inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  * 8) + ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1} ]{int} {_keyswitch_states} )
					changed0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {changed0}  := 1
					_keyswitch_enabled_time[(inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0}  * 8) + ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1} ]{int} {_keyswitch_enabled_time}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
				end if
				selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch}  := uiid2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {uiid2}  - (keyswitch_octave{int} {keyswitch_octave}  * 12)
				inc(ks1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {ks1} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
			inc(inst0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {inst0} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		if(changed0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {changed0}  = 1)
			call update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, Call, update_keyswitch_selection}
		end if
	end if
end function

function keyswitches_on_note{thread-unsafe}
	uiid2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {uiid2}  := id2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {id2} 
	call keyswitches_on_note_base{UserDefined, Call, keyswitches_on_note_base}
end function

function is_in_note_selection
	highest1{int} {highest1}  := 0
	select(lowest00{int} {lowest00} )
	case 0
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := 1
	case 1
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	case 2
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - 1){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	case 3
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - ((highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2) - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	case 4
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (((highest00{int} {highest00}  - 1) / 2) + 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	case 5
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	case 6
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := (((- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - ((highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2) - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - highest00{int} {highest00} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - (highest00{int} {highest00}  + 1), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - ((((highest00{int} {highest00}  + 1) - 1) / 2) + 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - (highest00{int} {highest00}  + 1), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	case 7
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - ((highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2) - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	case 8
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (((highest00{int} {highest00}  - 1) / 2) + 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	case 9
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	case 10
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + - sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  - 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	case 11
		highest1{int} {highest1}  := (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - (highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * (1 + sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) + (- sh_right(abs(s00{int} {s00}  - ((highest00{int} {highest00}  / 2) - 1)){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} * - sh_right(3 - highest00{int} {highest00} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	case 12

		end if

end function

function last_transitions_update
	i36{int} {i36}  := 0
	while(i36{int} {i36}  <= (num_elements(_last_transitions{int[]} {_last_transitions} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
		if(_last_transitions[i36{int} {i36} ]{int} {_last_transitions}  # -1)
			if(_last_transitions_timecode[i36{int} {i36} ]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode}  < (ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - 2000))
				_last_transitions[i36{int} {i36} ]{int} {_last_transitions}  := -1
			end if
		end if
		inc(i36{int} {i36} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function last_transitions_contains
	result11{int} {result11}  := 0
	call last_transitions_update{UserDefined, Call, last_transitions_update}
	i37{int} {i37}  := 0
	while(i37{int} {i37}  <= 7) 
		if(_last_transitions[(instrument3{int} {instrument3}  * 256) + ((keyswitch2{int} {keyswitch2}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx2{int} {subarticulation_idx2}  * 8) + i37{int} {i37} ))]{int} {_last_transitions}  = ((128 * transition_type0{int} {transition_type0} ) + note4{int} {note4} ))
			result11{int} {result11}  := 1
			_last_transitions[(instrument3{int} {instrument3}  * 256) + ((keyswitch2{int} {keyswitch2}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx2{int} {subarticulation_idx2}  * 8) + i37{int} {i37} ))]{int} {_last_transitions}  := -1
		end if
		inc(i37{int} {i37} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ret31{int} {ret31}  := result11{int} {result11} 
end function

function last_transitions_add_event
	idx38{int} {idx38}  := -1
	min5{int} {min5}  := _last_transitions_timecode[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + (subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8))]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode} 
	min_idx0{int} {min_idx0}  := 0
	i38{int} {i38}  := 0
	if(transition_type1{int} {transition_type1}  >= 0)
		i38{int} {i38}  := 0
		while(i38{int} {i38}  <= 7) 
			if(_last_transitions[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + i38{int} {i38} ))]{int} {_last_transitions}  = -1)
				idx38{int} {idx38}  := i38{int} {i38} 
				if(min5{int} {min5}  > _last_transitions_timecode[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + i38{int} {i38} ))]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode} )
					min5{int} {min5}  := _last_transitions_timecode[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + i38{int} {i38} ))]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode} 
					min_idx0{int} {min_idx0}  := i38{int} {i38} 
				end if
			end if
			inc(i38{int} {i38} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		if(idx38{int} {idx38}  # -1)
			_last_transitions[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + idx38{int} {idx38} ))]{int} {_last_transitions}  := (128 * transition_type1{int} {transition_type1} ) + note8{int} {note8} 
			_last_transitions_timecode[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + idx38{int} {idx38} ))]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
		else
			_last_transitions[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + min_idx0{int} {min_idx0} ))]{int} {_last_transitions}  := (128 * transition_type1{int} {transition_type1} ) + note8{int} {note8} 
			_last_transitions_timecode[(instrument5{int} {instrument5}  * 256) + ((keyswitch4{int} {keyswitch4}  * 32) + ((subarticulation_idx3{int} {subarticulation_idx3}  * 8) + min_idx0{int} {min_idx0} ))]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function repetition_engine_remove
	trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  := search(repetition_engine_subarticulation_events{int[]} {repetition_engine_subarticulation_events} , i270100{int} {i270100} ){Builtin, None, search}
	if(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  # -1)
		repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100} ]{int} {repetition_engine_subarticulation_events}  := -1
	end if
end function

function subarticulation_note_off
	if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(subarticulation_event_list[subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_list}  - -1){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs} = 1)
		message("release subart " & subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ){Builtin, None, message}
		subarticulation_id4{int} {subarticulation_id4}  := subarticulation_event_subarticulation[subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_subarticulation} 
		i270100{int} {i270100}  := subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} 
		call repetition_engine_remove{UserDefined, Call, repetition_engine_remove}
		if(((subarticulations_release_time[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id4{int} {subarticulation_id4} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_release_time}  = 0) or ((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - last_pressed[subarticulation_event_note[subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_note} ]{int} {last_pressed} ) < subarticulations_release_time[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id4{int} {subarticulation_id4} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_release_time} )) or (_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[(articulation_event_instrument[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_articulation_event} ]{int} {articulation_event_instrument}  * 32) + ((articulation_event_keyswitch[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_articulation_event} ]{int} {articulation_event_keyswitch}  * 4) + subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[subarticulation_event_id11{int} {subarticulation_event_id11} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed}  > 0))

function repetition_engine_update_tempo
	subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}){Builtin, None, real} / 960

						if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(result6{int} {result6}  * 32) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 4) + layer0{int} {layer0} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_type}  = 0) and (_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[(result6{int} {result6}  * 32) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 4) + layer0{int} {layer0} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed}  > 0))

function murmation_rng
	articulation_event_id1{int} {articulation_event_id1}  := 0
	i330{int} {i330}  := NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} {NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING} 
	is_active0100{int} {is_active0100}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  / 25
	_ret28000{int} {_ret28000}  := random(0, 10000000){Builtin, None, random}
	call switch{UserDefined, Call, switch}
	articulation_event_id1{int} {articulation_event_id1}  := i320{int} {i320} 
	articulation_event_id1{int} {articulation_event_id1}  := (8088405 * articulation_event_id1{int} {articulation_event_id1} ) + 1
	trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  := ((sh_right(articulation_event_id1{int} {articulation_event_id1} , 8){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 16777215) mod ((ret19{int} {ret19}  - i270100{int} {i270100} ) + 1)) + i270100{int} {i270100} 
end function

function murmation_engine_listener
	if(any_murmation_active{int} {any_murmation_active}  = 1)

function subarticulation_group_count
	lowest1{int} {lowest1}  := 0
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_type}  = 2) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_type}  = 9))
		lowest1{int} {lowest1}  := 6 * ((subarticulations_dynamic_layers[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_dynamic_layers}  * 3) + subarticulations_trans_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_trans_num} )
	else
		lowest1{int} {lowest1}  := (6 * subarticulations_interval_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_interval_num} ) * ((subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rr_num}  * subarticulations_dynamic_layers[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_dynamic_layers} ) * (1 + subarticulations_release_group[subarticulations_ids_positions[fade_time1{int} {fade_time1} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_release_group} ))
	end if
	i6{int} {i6}  := lowest1{int} {lowest1} 
end function

function toggle_con_sordino
	iii2{int} {iii2}  := 0
	while(iii2{int} {iii2}  <= 4) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , abs(sh_right(abs(ii8{int} {ii8} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs}, -1, 0, iii2{int} {iii2}  + NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		message("Con Sordino: " & ii8{int} {ii8}  & " for channel " & iii2{int} {iii2} ){Builtin, None, message}
		inc(iii2{int} {iii2} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function dev_keys.get_preset_path
	fade_in_start0{int} {fade_in_start0}  := 0
	while(fade_in_start0{int} {fade_in_start0}  = 0) 
		if(modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0}  = 1)
			ret34{string} {ret34}  := base_path{string} {base_path} 
			fade_in_start0{int} {fade_in_start0}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		else
			ret34{string} {ret34}  := preset_path{string} {preset_path} 
			fade_in_start0{int} {fade_in_start0}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
	end while
end function

		end if
	end if
end function

	end if
end function

				set_control_par(lbl_center_circle_bound_left[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_center_circle_bound_left} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}

function update_dynamic_range_control
	xy_dynamic_range[0]{real} {xy_dynamic_range}  := real(_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 32) + ((selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch}  * 4) + selected_subarticulation{int} {selected_subarticulation} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	xy_dynamic_range[2]{real} {xy_dynamic_range}  := real(_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 32) + ((selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch}  * 4) + selected_subarticulation{int} {selected_subarticulation} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} + int(xy_dynamic_range[0]{real} {xy_dynamic_range}  * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} + int(xy_dynamic_range[2]{real} {xy_dynamic_range}  * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}) - 1){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_line{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_line} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_line{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_line} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} - get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	layer0{int} {layer0}  := int((real(modulation_positions[0]{int} {modulation_positions} ){Builtin, None, real} * (1 - (real(polyphonic_modulation_percentage{int} {polyphonic_modulation_percentage} ){Builtin, None, real} / 100))) + ((real(modulation_positions[0]{int} {modulation_positions} ){Builtin, None, real} * real(polyphonic_modulation_percentage{int} {polyphonic_modulation_percentage} ){Builtin, None, real}) / 100)){Builtin, None, int}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_cursor{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_cursor} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} - 3) + int((real(((layer0{int} {layer0}  * (1 + (sh_right(127 - layer0{int} {layer0} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(layer0{int} {layer0}  - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - sh_right(layer0{int} {layer0}  - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}) - (127 * sh_right(127 - layer0{int} {layer0} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} - get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{int} {lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
end function

function center_circle_distance
	fade_level00{real} {fade_level00}  := fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  - 0.5
	weight0{real} {weight0}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength00{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength00}  - 0.5
	subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  := sqrt((fade_level00{real} {fade_level00}  * fade_level00{real} {fade_level00} ) + (weight0{real} {weight0}  * weight0{real} {weight0} )){Builtin, None, sqrt}
end function

function center_circle_angle
	fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  := fade_level00{real} {fade_level00}  - 0.5
	subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength00{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength00}  - 0.5
	subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001}  := fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  / sqrt((fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  * fade_level0{real} {fade_level0} ) + (subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  * subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000} )){Builtin, None, sqrt}
	fade_level01{real} {fade_level01}  := acos(subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001} ){Builtin, None, acos}
	if(subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  < 0)
		fade_level01{real} {fade_level01}  := (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI} ) - fade_level01{real} {fade_level01} 
	end if
	weight0{real} {weight0}  := fade_level01{real} {fade_level01} 
end function

function angle_to_value
	fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  := fade_level01{real} {fade_level01}  + (NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI}  / 2)
	if(fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  > (NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI}  * 2))
		fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  := fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  - (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI} )
	end if
	fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  := abs(fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  - (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI} )){Builtin, None, abs}
	subarticulation_event0{int} {subarticulation_event0}  := int((127 * (fade_level0{real} {fade_level0}  - subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001} )) / (subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  - subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001} )){Builtin, None, int}
end function

	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_keyswitch_name{int} {lbl_keyswitch_name} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , _articulation_names[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{string} {_articulation_names} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon{int} {lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , _articulation_icon[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_icon} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min{int} {sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , _articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max{int} {sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , _articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {sli_keyswitch_volume_curve} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , _articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve}  * -1){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope{int[]} {lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
		set_control_par(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , int(round(real(int((real(_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * 50){Builtin, None, int}){Builtin, None, real} + (real(int((real(_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * 50){Builtin, None, int} - int((real(_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * 50){Builtin, None, int}){Builtin, None, real} * pow(real(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, real} / real(num_elements(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope{int[]} {lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}){Builtin, None, real}, (real(_articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve} ){Builtin, None, real} / 100) + 1){Builtin, None, pow})){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, int}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
		set_control_par(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line{int} {lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} - get_control_par(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}

end function

		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_expression_slider{int} {lbl_expression_slider} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}

function set_key_colors
	modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0}  := 0
	while(modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0}  <= 127) 
		set_key_color(modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int} {KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		if((modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0}  >= nki_range[0]{int} {nki_range} ) and (modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0}  <= nki_range[1]{int} {nki_range} ))
			set_key_color(modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0} , KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int} {KEY_COLOR_BLUE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		end if
		inc(modulation_position0{int} {modulation_position0} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
		set_key_color((keyswitch_octave{int} {keyswitch_octave}  * 12) + i{int} {i} , KEY_COLOR_RED{int} {KEY_COLOR_RED} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		if(_keyswitch_states[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_keyswitch_states}  = 1)
			set_key_color((keyswitch_octave{int} {keyswitch_octave}  * 12) + i{int} {i} , KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{int} {KEY_COLOR_ORANGE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function apply_scroll_offset
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(btn_subarticulation_browser_selection{int[]} {btn_subarticulation_browser_selection} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1))

function Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight
	subarticulation_idx7{int} {subarticulation_idx7}  := 0
	while(subarticulation_idx7{int} {subarticulation_idx7}  = 0) 
		rr1{int} {rr1}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} 
		allow_repetitions0{int} {allow_repetitions0}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  + 18
		if((note14{int} {note14}  >= rr1{int} {rr1} ) and (note14{int} {note14}  < allow_repetitions0{int} {allow_repetitions0} ))
			keyswitch12{int} {keyswitch12}  := 1
			subarticulation_idx7{int} {subarticulation_idx7}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		else
			keyswitch12{int} {keyswitch12}  := 0
			subarticulation_idx7{int} {subarticulation_idx7}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
	end while
end function
